safety_boundary: No Project Reborn code was executed.
No Project Reborn code was imported.
No Project Reborn code was copied into audio_quality_humanizer/.
No Project Reborn code was packaged or exposed through the CLI.
Planning notes are future-review inputs only, not product claims.

manual_text_evidence: Text-only review found validate_audio_content, safe_filter_design, safe_filter_apply, safe_nan_cleanup, safe_time_stretch, safe_stft_processing, and harmonic_enhancement.
The file mixes useful guardrail names with legacy unsafe removal and tone-detection framing.
safe_observed_ideas: Validate signal arrays before and after processing.
Bound filter parameters by sample rate, audio length, and filter stability.
Clean NaN and infinite values with explicit fallback behavior.
Add short-audio and STFT guardrails for unusual inputs.
Explore harmonic enhancement as a conservative quality-control idea only.
ignore_parts: Legacy functions and class names tied to watermark removal or suspicious-tone behavior.
Any logic intended to change recognizability, attribution, provenance, or detector behavior.
Any behavior that treats detection results as a processing target.
top5.recommendation: Rewrite guardrails from first principles as conservative processing validation helpers.

manual_text_evidence: Text-only review found PerformanceConfig, PerformanceOptimizer, MemoryMonitor, StreamingProcessor, chunk splitting, chunk reconstruction, batch feature processing, and benchmark scaffolding.
The reusable direction is operational structure for validation and performance checks, not a new audio effect.
safe_observed_ideas: Chunk size and overlap configuration for large-file workflows.
Sequential chunk processing with fallback to the original chunk on failure.
Reconstruction checks that preserve length and channel structure.
Memory usage reporting as diagnostic metadata.
Benchmark scaffolding for comparing workflow cost across presets or validation jobs.
ignore_parts: GPU, JIT, multiprocessing, and psutil dependency assumptions unless a new design proves they are needed.
Any chunk worker that calls legacy processing behavior.
Any real-time workflow until the active CLI has a clear user need and safety gates.
top5.recommendation: Design a small validation/performance harness around existing workflows before considering optional heavy dependencies.

manual_text_evidence: Text-only review found create_test_audio, compute_audio_metrics, calculate_snr, short-audio tests, edge-case tests, and preservation-style assertions.
The file imports legacy modules and contains detector/removal assertions that must not be reused.
safe_observed_ideas: Small synthetic audio fixtures that avoid external media.
Edge-case tests for NaN values, quiet input, short clips, and mono/stereo shapes.
SNR and broad-quality metrics for regression assertions.
Tests that verify conservative processing preserves core audio properties.
ignore_parts: Legacy imports from old remover modules.
Assertions about detection or removal outcomes.
Any test naming that implies source-attribution or detector effects.
top5.recommendation: Translate only neutral test shapes into new tests for existing safe workflows.

manual_text_evidence: Text-only review found _calculate_basic_metrics, _compare_spectral_content, _calculate_quality_metrics, compare_files, and generate_report.
The file includes detector dependencies and unsafe report sections that must stay out of active code.
safe_observed_ideas: Basic metrics such as SNR, correlation, RMSE, and dynamic-range change.
Spectral-content summaries by frequency band.
Quality-metric deltas such as spectral centroid, rolloff, RMS, and bandwidth.
A structured report layout for before/after quality checks.
ignore_parts: The legacy analyzer class name and any detector dependency.
Any category, score, or report section about watermark outcomes.
Any interpretation that compare can prove attribution, recognition, provenance, or detector changes.
top5.recommendation: Review only neutral metric/report concepts, then rewrite them into the existing read-only compare boundary.

manual_text_evidence: Text-only review found ProcessingConfig, ProcessingStats, AudioProcessor, AdvancedAudioAnalysis, clean_metadata_comprehensive, calculate_spectral_entropy, calculate_complexity_measures, and chunk reconstruction helpers.
The file is dominated by legacy unsafe framing, so any future work needs a fresh design and stricter safety review.
safe_observed_ideas: Processing configuration and timing statistics as product-neutral operational metadata.
Metadata inspection and explicit reporting of changed container tags.
Spectral entropy, flatness, and simple complexity metrics as audio-quality analysis candidates after renaming and redefining their purpose.
Chunked processing structure for long files, only if rewritten with current safety gates.
ignore_parts: Any fingerprint, watermark, or remover behavior.
Any pattern-normalization, attribution-targeting, or recognizability-targeting logic.
Legacy CLI behavior and user-facing claims.
top5.recommendation: Keep as design-only reference material until a separate approved milestone defines safe metadata/statistics or analysis behavior from first principles.
